final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic architectural visualization render of a modern living room blending Nordic minimalism and Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetics.

Style/medium: photorealistic architectural visualization, CGI interior render in the spirit of Norm Architects and Axel Vervoordt, natural and restrained
Composition: wide-angle interior shot at seated eye level, slight three-point perspective to show depth, full room visible with floor-to-ceiling window on one side
Subject: low-profile linen off-white fabric sofa with several throw pillows in varied textures; irregular-edged natural stone coffee table with raw organic silhouette; tall fiddle-leaf fig (琴叶榕) in a corner planter; slender arc floor lamp with a thin stem; open shelving with a sparse curated selection of books and ceramic objects following 断舍离 principles
Scene/backdrop: modern interior living room; pale matte white walls; light-toned white oak solid wood flooring; floor-to-ceiling windows flooding the space with natural daylight; softly blurred green foliage visible outside the window
Lighting/mood: abundant diffused natural daylight from the large floor-to-ceiling window, soft shadows with no harsh edges, warm-neutral color temperature, quiet and meditative zen atmosphere
Color palette: white and light grey as dominant tones, warm pale white-oak wood as grounding accent, muted off-white linen as mid-tone, minimal green from the plant as the sole organic accent
Materials/textures: matte white paint on walls, brushed natural white oak grain on floor, woven linen fabric on sofa, raw stone surface with visible mineral veining on coffee table, unglazed ceramic finishes on shelf objects
Constraints: space must feel uncluttered and restrained; no decorative excess; every object must serve a visual or functional purpose; wabi-sabi imperfection in natural materials must be visible
Avoid: glossy surfaces, over-saturated colors, symmetrical staged-showroom feel, floating objects, lens flare, artificial studio lighting, generic IKEA catalog aesthetic
